# SEO Skill

When implementing SEO for React SPAs:

- Define unique title and meta description per page.
- Set canonical URLs for indexable pages.
- Generate and maintain sitemap.xml and robots.txt.
- Add Open Graph and Twitter metadata for shared links.
- Avoid duplicate or thin pages in index strategy.
- Ensure route URLs are stable and human-readable when possible.

## Checklist

- Do all main pages have title and description?
- Are canonical tags correct for deployed base path?
- Are sitemap and robots aligned with indexing intent?
- Are social meta tags present for key pages?
- Is there a clear rule for noindex pages (auth/internal/test)?
